changes.description: WIDESCREEN BUILD
Ourplized the Freeplay Menu
Ourplized the Controls Options Menu
Replaced the shader effect in the Title Screen
Replaced Lore Tropical Mix background with a non-AI generated image
Updated LORAY Credits Menu
Fixed Category graphics in Freeplay Category Select Menu not updating it's antialiasing setting
Fixed the score not updating on the first selection of the Freeplay Menu
Fixed Phone RTX skin's camera position
Fixed "Taking Notes" achievement keeping track of pause counter between different songs
Fixed version number in Main Menu not being updated
Added a "Skins" input, which opens the Skins Selector menu (only whilst in-game or in the pause menu)
Added the option to prevent Ourple Guy characters from doing the funny dance
Added arrows between the categories' name in the Freeplay Selection menu
Fixed missing crowd in 'Measure Up' cover level
Fixed Lore Apology intro cutscene not showing sometimes
Fixed weird transition when accessing to Options menu whilst playing the Lua song
NEW SKINS SELECTOR - Skins now affect all three characters, not just Ourple Guy
ANDROID BUILD (made in less than a week, iOS is possible if added to App Store)
NEW ORIGINAL MIX: Presidency
NEW SECRET SONG
REPORTED ALL THE SONGS TO SOURCE
SUPPORTS ANY SCREEN RESOLUTIONS (ultra-wide screen build coming soon)
GAMEPLAY OVERHAUL for 'I can, tho' minigame
Decreased default chances for distracting enemies to appear
Removed Ourple Guy variants due to owners request
Removed Lore Style Mix Cover (Owner's request)
Removed Fever v2 (Owner's request)
Fixed weird game state bug when playing the game for too long
Fixed crash/glitchy music when using the music player in Freeplay
Fixed Loading Screen tip text's positioning
Many more bug fixes
OURPLE SKIN SELECTOR (WIP)!
ACHIEVEMENTS!
Added Repugnant Cover
Added Lore AR Mix
Added Sunk (Lore Iron Lung Mix) to the Originals
Added proper credits (with new Credits subgroups)
Added a Loading Screen (by whitemungus) with tips
Added a Matpat art (by whitemungus) in the Freeplay Select Menu
Added an exit button on most of the menus for mouse cursor users
Added a saving icon at the bottom right corner of the screen
Added a time bar color changing mechanic
Readded miss counter
Added Ourple Game Over screen
Added Ourple Pause Menu
Added a Lore Origins options substate menu
Added the Ourple Countdown Animations
Added cool main menu intro animation
NEW OURPLES ADDED: Hrey Guy, Nuu Guy, Bloxxy Guy, Wink Woman, Blink Dude and Cool Buddy
Remixed Tropical Mix
Remixed Lore Sad Mix
Ported some of the Lua codes to Source (better performance)
Changed Menu Transitions
Detective now looks better
Clicking on LORAYs in the Loray Credits Menu will play a randomized sound
Recentered the Main Menu elements
Set Freeplay Menu to gray for songs considered old (more than a year old)
Brought back the HaxeFlixel intro (with a twist)
Changed the FPS counter font
Reduced size of the mouse cursor
Shuffled the images in the Chronology cutscene
Removed the Note Colors option menu
Removed the Rating offset menu to the Adjust Delay/Note option menu
Fixed scores in Freeplay not showing up
Fixed randomizer triggering when restarting the song in the Music Player of the Freeplay Menu
Fixed the Freeplay Select State not saving the last selected Freeplay Category
Fixed a bug where accessing the Options menu from the Main Menu would go back to PlayState
Fixed score text not appearing on Middlescroll
Fixed LORAY watermark hitbox being too large
Added Action cover
Revamped Main Menu (Lore art by @whitemungus)
Revamped Options Menu
Remade old Lore covers (> 1 year old)
Moved Psych Engine version (0.6.3 -> 0.7.3)
Added back the time left on the time bar
Ourplized the flashing lights warning screen
Added lore related intro texts
Fixed mouse graphic offset
Fixed main menu items going idle when hovering one with the mouse and moving the mouse away
Fixed a couple of bugs
Added Measure Up Cover
Added an outdated mechanic
Made some menus accessible using the mouse
Added Detective cover
Added new cursor image
Made some menus accessible using the mouse
Fixed some oopsies
Re-added the Gameplay Changer Menu in Freeplay
Fixed instrumental for Lore Sad Mix
Fixed a bug where you could spam enter to glitch the Freeplay Select Menu
Fixed Discord RPC not showing the logo of the exe
Removed more unused code for better performance
Added Lore Sad Mix
New credits look (originally from Iron Lung v2)
Fixed icon placement at the beginning of the song
Updated the New Ourple Guy HUD to be 100% accurate (thanks for publishing the source code :p)
Added Lore Apology Mix P-CORE cover
Improved the Freeplay Select Menu
Removed Shaggers
Added Lore Horse Mix cover
The LORAY menu element now has its own menu!
Slight adjustment of the HUD again
Added Freeplay Categories: Covers and Originals
Added Live cover
Added Lore Tropical Mix in Originals
Added Options in the Pause Menu
Added Custom Discord Rich Presence
Added Custom App Icon
Slightly updated the HUD
Updated Title Screen
Updated Menus
Credits now open both YouTube and Twitter page
Remade the Note Offset Menu to be Lore Themed
Added Ourple Guy as Boyfriend in the Graphics Settings Menu
Fixed HUD on Downscroll
Brute-forced the position of the rating sprites
Added a ZIP version (for non-WinRAR owners)
Initial mod release
